title: [balls_game]
description: [balls_game] includes around 100 carefully selected mods (each of them being relatively FOSS), blending tech, magic, and physics-driven mechanics without turning the game into too much of a mess. (KITCHEN SINK MODPACK)
body:
![says "balls game" in a minecraft title-screen style](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f024995987905bc1940093efc37fe13a3deb206.png)
**[balls_game]**: A private modpack made for just my friends and I.

### IF USING >=v1.3.0, USE JAVA 21!

It includes around 100 carefully selected mods (each of them being relatively FOSS), blending tech, magic, and physics-driven mechanics without turning the game into too much of a mess.

Major content mods include:
- [**Create**](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) for complex mechanical automation.
- [**Hexcasting**](https://modrinth.com/mod/hex-casting) for programmable spellcasting.
- [**Valkyrien Skies**](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies) for fully physics-enabled ships and moving structures.

On the visual side, it includes [**Caxton**](https://modrinth.com/mod/caxton) support for custom fonts and works seamlessly with [**Iris**](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) for shader compatibility.

Built for stability, smoother gameplay, and a mix of automation, magic, and large-scale engineering.
